items.title: Reach out to Strategic LP banks/FIs with Opti customer-facing materials
items.context: Email from Richie on Apr 28: 'We're planning to reach out to a handful of large banks / financial institutions that could serve as potential clients. Could you please share customer facing materials?' Barak replied Apr 29 with one-pager and intro paragraph ready to use.

items.title: Respond to Matt's preemption question on VanishID round
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 28: 'A few investors shared that they are waiting for our quarterly results... We expect a strong result and anticipate term sheets in the coming weeks... Are you interested in preempting?'

items.title: Follow up with Simone for pitch deck and materials
items.context: Email from Jake on Apr 28: 'When you get a chance, can you please share the materials for our review?' after initial meeting with Simone on Apr 27.

items.title: Follow up with Gio on 7 data room diligence questions
items.context: Email from Stephanie on Apr 28 with 7 detailed questions (AI commoditization risk, migration process, ICP expansion, GTM segmentation, TAM, pricing, competitive comp). Gio replied Apr 29: 'Will follow up on this.'

items.title: Prep for May 4 intro meeting with Boris Vaynberg
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital // Blast Security' on May 4 at 1pm ET on Teams with boris@blast.security and borisv@blast.security. Boris rescheduled from original slot on Apr 28.

items.title: Prep for May 6 IndyKite follow-up meeting with Lasse and Clare
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Indy Kite <> Fin Capital' on May 6 at 4:30pm ET with lasse.andresen@indykite.com and clare.liebenberg@indykite.com. Currently reviewing data room and waiting for a lead.

items.title: Coordinate in-person meeting with Eddie and Rahul at ServiceNow Knowledge (May 5-7)
items.context: Email from eddie@echelonai.com on Apr 24: 'Rahul and I would love to meet up in person. Here's a link to my calendar; I'd love to get some time.' ServiceNow Knowledge Conference is May 5-7.

items.title: Prep for NTT Data catch-up on May 7
items.context: Calendar event 'Catch-up: NTT Data <> Fin Capital' on May 7 at 4pm ET with yanni.zhou@nttdata.com and kousuke.mitsuoka@nttdata.com — LP/strategic partner quarterly sync.
